ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the product based on expert reviews */,
  "hint" TEXT /* Hint or tagline for the product */,
  "user_response" TEXT /* User response or feedback for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "water_resistance" INTEGER /* Water resistance of the product in meters */,
  "battery_free" INTEGER /* Whether the product has battery-free power */,
  "solar_power" INTEGER /* Whether the product is solar-powered */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the product in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retailers" (
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retailer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the retailer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the retailer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the retailer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the retailer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the retailer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the retailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retailer */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the retailer */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code for the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_retailer_id FOREIGN KEY ("retailer_id") REFERENCES retailers ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: Rank of the product based on expert reviews
Hint or tagline for the product
User response or feedback for the product
Water resistance of the product in meters
Whether the product has battery-free power
Additional features of the product in JSON format
Unique identifier for each price entry
Date when the price was last updated
Discount percentage offered by the retailer
Date when the review was written
Number of helpful votes for the review
Whether the review is from a verified purchase
Password for the user (hashed for security)
